phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: Q the contacts and stack the gathering storm of your third-strike knockup — mid rarely respects melee poke until it lifts them.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: W joins: the cone shield turns even trades dishonest — yours comes with a refund.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: E online — the soul window: dash in, trade everything, snap back with the receipt. The lane's rudest tempo trick.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: E-Q3-W cycles on cooldown: enter spirit form, trade the knockup window, return before the answer matters.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Fate Sealed online — the R lines up entire waves of people: knockup into full string into snap-back safety.

phases.label: First item
phases.why: First item spike: soul-window trades chunk half bars and the mixed damage laughs at single-stat defenses.

phases.label: 2+ items
phases.why: Late Yone flanks in spirit: E behind the fight, R the line your team froze, and snap back out of the obituary.

phases.why: Late Yone flanks in spirit: E behind the fight, R the line your team froze, and snap back out of the obituary.

phases.label: Level 1
phases.why: Q the contacts and stack the gathering storm of your third-strike knockup — mid rarely respects melee poke until it lifts them.

phases.label: Level 2
phases.why: W joins: the cone shield turns even trades dishonest — yours comes with a refund.

phases.label: Level 3
phases.why: E online — the soul window: dash in, trade everything, snap back with the receipt. The lane's rudest tempo trick.

phases.label: Levels 4-5
phases.why: E-Q3-W cycles on cooldown: enter spirit form, trade the knockup window, return before the answer matters.

phases.label: Level 6
phases.why: Fate Sealed online — the R lines up entire waves of people: knockup into full string into snap-back safety.

phases.label: First item
